entries.title: 1.6L Diesel

Timing chain tensioner wear on early DV6C units

Turbo actuator sticking on high-mileage examples

commonProblems.h2: Citroen DS5 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Citroen DS5 relies heavily on PSA’s EP6 petrol, DV6 1.6L HDi/BlueHDi, and DW10 2.0L diesel families, all of which have well-documented failure patterns as mileage increases. While many issues can be managed with early intervention, catastrophic failures like timing chain collapse or high-pressure fuel pump destruction often make full Citroen DS5 engine replacement the most cost-effective solution. Every rebuilt Citroen DS5 engine supplied through our network includes upgraded internal components specifically designed to address these original weak points, backed by a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.group: Citroen DS5 THP Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Citroen DS5 THP Timing Chain Failure - Why EP6 Petrol Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Citroen DS5 1.6 THP 156, 165, 200, 210 (2011-2018, EP6CDTM, EP6FDTM, EP6CDT, 5G04)
problems.rootCause: The rear-mounted timing chain tensioner on the EP6 Prince engine lacks sufficient hydraulic pressure over time, allowing the chain to stretch and skip teeth. This disrupts cam/crank correlation, triggering the P0016 fault code and often leading to piston-valve contact if ignored.
problems.recommendation: If your Citroen DS5 THP is still running smoothly below 60,000 miles, upgrading the timing chain kit proactively is significantly cheaper than waiting for catastrophic failure. However, if you’re already experiencing P0016 fault codes, loud rattling on startup, or loss of compression, replacement with a rebuilt unit fitted with upgraded components is the only reliable path forward.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EP6 Citroen DS5 engine prices and get supply & fit quotes

problems.h4: Citroen DS5 1.6 HDi HPFP Failure - Why DV6 Diesel Engines Lose Power & Fail
problems.rootCause: Internal wear within the DV6 high-pressure fuel pump generates fine metallic debris that circulates through the fuel rail and injectors. Once the debris reaches the combustion chamber, it causes injector scoring, cylinder wall damage, and eventual engine seizure.
problems.recommendation: Once metallic contamination from a failing HPFP reaches the engine oil and combustion chambers, partial repairs rarely hold. On a Citroen DS5 valued at £2,500-£4,500, investing in a rebuilt 1.6 HDi with pre-cleaned fuel pathways and upgraded filtration offers the best balance of longevity and value retention.
problems.cta: Get instant quotes for Citroen DS5 9HD / 9HR rebuilt engine replacement

problems.group: Citroen DS5 2.0 BlueHDi Turbo & EGR Failure
problems.h4: Citroen DS5 2.0 BlueHDi Turbo & EGR Failure - Why DW10 Diesel Engines Suffer Power Loss
problems.affectedModels: Citroen DS5 2.0 HDi 160, 2.0 BlueHDi 150/180 (2011-2018, DW10CB, DW10CTED4, DW10FD)
problems.rootCause: Prolonged short-trip driving causes excessive soot buildup in the EGR cooler and turbocharger oil feed lines. The resulting carbonisation restricts turbo spool, triggers DPF regeneration cycles, and ultimately leads to turbo bearing failure or piston ring glazing.
problems.recommendation: If your Citroen DS5 2.0 BlueHDi is still holding compression and shows no signs of coolant mixing or severe knock, a specialist turbo and EGR service can restore performance at a fraction of replacement cost. However, if oil consumption exceeds 1 litre per 1,000 miles or the turbo has seized, full Citroen DS5 engine replacement is the only financially sensible route.
problems.cta: Compare Citroen DS5 DW10CTED4 / DW10FD rebuilt engine prices today

problems.h4: Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 Drivetrain Failure - Why PSA’s Diesel-Electric System Requires Specialist Replacement
problems.affectedModels: Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 200 Airdream (2012-2015, DW10CTED4 + Rear Electric Motor)
problems.rootCause: The Hybrid4 system’s rear electric motor coupling suffers from bearing wear and high-voltage battery cell degradation. When the electric assist fails or the diesel front unit experiences compounded load stress, the drivetrain shunts and the system defaults to limp mode.
problems.recommendation: The Hybrid4 system cannot be reliably serviced by general mechanics due to its complex diesel-electric coupling and high-voltage architecture. If your Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 is experiencing drivetrain shunt or hybrid mode failure, sourcing a specialist-rebuilt powertrain that has been bench-tested for hybrid integration is strongly advised over piecemeal component swaps.
problems.cta: Get specialist quotes for Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 rebuilt engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Citroen DS5
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you’re facing a stretched timing chain on a 1.6 THP, HPFP contamination on a 1.6 HDi, or Hybrid4 coupling wear, delaying the decision only increases the final repair bill and risks permanent engine damage. EngineMarket connects you directly with vetted UK Citroen DS5 specialists who provide transparent, side-by-side pricing for rebuilt, reconditioned, and used engines. Every unit we recommend includes upgraded internal components to eliminate the original failure point, comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty, and is backed by nationwide supply & fit networks.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Citroen DS5 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Citroen DS5 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Citroen DS5 Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every engine displacement fitted to the Citroen DS5 across its UK production run is listed below, with matching engine codes, model years, variant compatibility, and known failure points to help you source the correct replacement unit.

items.title: Citroen DS5 1.6L Diesel Engines
items.description: Introduced at the 2011 launch and updated for the 2015 facelift with BlueHDi technology, the 1.6-litre diesel served as the entry-level and volume-selling unit for the DS5 lineup. Featuring PSA's common-rail injection and turbocharging, this DV6-family engine balanced urban efficiency with adequate torque for the model's weight, though stop-start and micro-hybrid variants added mild electrification. As the most widely registered DS5 powertrain, it represents the highest volume of replacement requests across the UK network.
commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration issues on short urban cycles
items.cta: Get quotes for Citroen DS5 1.6L diesel engines

items.title: Citroen DS5 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0-litre DW10 family diesel provided the DS5 with stronger torque and refined highway cruising capability, appearing in both standard HDi and later Euro 6 BlueHDi formats. Fitted to mid-to-high specification trims like Executive and Prestige, this displacement utilised reinforced bottom-end components and, in its 180hp guise, an EAT6 automatic transmission. While mechanically robust, higher-mileage examples frequently require attention to ancillary emissions and forced induction systems.
commonFailurePoints: injector seal deterioration leading to misfires
items.cta: Get quotes for Citroen DS5 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Citroen DS5 1.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: Co-developed with BMW under the "Prince" engine programme, the 1.6-litre turbocharged THP petrol was the DS5's sole combustion petrol offering, delivering responsive performance and high specific output for its class. Available in 156hp, 165hp, and 210hp states of tune across the pre- and post-facelift generations, it featured direct injection and variable valve timing to balance power with refinement. Despite its engaging driving character, widespread attention has focused on its internal lubrication and timing components, making it a frequent candidate for specialist rebuilds.
commonFailurePoints: VANOS solenoid malfunction triggering P0016 codes
items.cta: Compare Citroen DS5 1.6L petrol engine prices

groups.title: Citroen DS5 Hybrid / MHEV Engine Sizes

items.title: Citroen DS5 2.0L Hybrid Engines
items.description: PSA's pioneering diesel-electric Hybrid4 system paired a front-mounted 2.0-litre HDi engine with a rear-mounted 37hp electric motor to deliver all-wheel drive capability and 200hp combined output. Launched in 2012 as the Airdream variant, this unique powertrain positioned the DS5 as a technological flagship, utilising a 6-speed automated manual transmission and sophisticated energy recovery algorithms. Specialist replacement is often required due to the complex integration of high-voltage components and dual-drivetrain coupling, rather than standard mechanical failure alone.
commonFailurePoints: diesel HPFP contamination under hybrid load cycling
items.cta: Enquire about Citroen DS5 2.0L hybrid engine availability

engineYears.h2: Citroen DS5 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: Covering the full 2011-2018 UK production timeline, this section breaks down every major engine update and generation shift so you can pinpoint your exact year, compare rebuilt engine prices, and avoid cross-year compatibility errors.

years.description: The inaugural production years established the DS5's core powertrain lineup, introducing the controversial PSA 1.6 THP petrol and the innovative but complex Hybrid4 diesel-electric system.
keyChanges: Full UK market launch with Euro 5 1.6 HDi and 2.0 HDi diesel engines
Introduction of the PSA "Prince" 1.6 THP petrol with direct injection and twin-scroll turbo
2012 launch of the world-first Hybrid4 diesel-electric AWD system with rear electric motor
DStyle and DSport trim levels introduced alongside executive-level specifications
knownFor: Initial launch reliability marred by early THP timing chain tensioner weakness
HPFP failures begin appearing on high-mileage 1.6 HDi fleet and short-lease examples
Hybrid4 gains niche acclaim for unique AWD torque split but faces specialist servicing hurdles
Strong demand for early 2.0 HDi replacements due to commercial turnover and higher mileage accumulation
years.cta: Get quotes for 2011-2012 Citroen DS5 replacement engines
years.ticker: Citroen DS5 2011 1.6 HDi engine replacement • Citroen DS5 2012 THP timing chain failure • Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 diesel-electric swap
enquiries: Citroen DS5 2012 THP timing chain failure

years.description: These peak registration years refined the existing Euro 5 range, adding the stop-start e-HDi 115 micro-hybrid system while THP and standard HDi failures began driving significant replacement enquiries.
keyChanges: Introduction of e-HDi 115 with stop-start battery recuperation and 6-speed manual gearbox
Software updates to EGR management and DPF regeneration cycles for urban compliance
Minor trim revisions and expanded DStyle/DSport option packs for private buyers
No major platform shifts; focus on production volume and dealer network support
knownFor: Highest volume of UK registrations, making replacement core units more readily available
P0016 fault code searches surge as THP timing chains approach the 60k-80k mile failure window
e-HDi micro-hybrid auxiliary battery failures occasionally mistaken for main engine faults
Diesel DPF saturation issues prominent on short-journey urban owners
years.cta: Compare 2013-2014 Citroen DS5 engine replacement costs

years.description: The significant 2015 mid-cycle facelift replaced all Euro 5 diesel units with AdBlue-equipped BlueHDi engines, while the THP range received updated tensioners and a new 210hp performance variant.
keyChanges: Complete diesel line-up transition to Euro 6 BlueHDi 120/150/180 with SCR AdBlue systems
THP 156 updated to 165hp (EP6FDTM) with revised VANOS solenoids and reinforced timing components
2016 introduction of the high-performance THP 210 with EAT6 automatic transmission
Cosmetic interior refresh, new front fascia, and upgraded infotainment systems
knownFor: Euro 6 compliance significantly reduces particulate emissions but introduces AdBlue pump and urea crystallisation faults
Revised THP tensioners extend lifespan, though early 2015 transitional models still suffer pre-facelift weakness
THP 210 gains enthusiast praise for torque delivery but requires specialist turbo and intercooler maintenance
BlueHDi 180 with EAT6 gearbox establishes itself as the preferred long-distance cruiser
years.cta: Enquire about 2015-2016 Citroen DS5 rebuilt engine availability
years.ticker: Citroen DS5 2015 BlueHDi AdBlue fault • Citroen DS5 2016 THP 210 engine replacement • Citroen DS5 1.6 THP 165 P0016 code fix
enquiries: Citroen DS5 1.6 THP 165 P0016 code fix

years.description: The concluding years of Citroen DS5 production saw the model transition under the standalone DS Automobiles marque, with the THP 210 cementing its status as the definitive performance flagship before the line-up was discontinued.
keyChanges: Official branding shift to DS Automobiles (DS 5) with minor specification and trim updates
Final production run focused on Prestige and high-spec THP 210 variants
Introduction of the rare 5G06 PureTech variant in limited European markets (minimal UK presence)
Gradual phase-out of hybrid and standard diesel options ahead of 2018 discontinuation
knownFor: Lowest overall UK sales volume due to premium positioning and shifting market preference to SUVs
Late-model BlueHDi engines show improved AdBlue system reliability but higher specialist replacement costs
THP 210 remains highly sought after for specialist rebuilds due to low supply and performance demand
Owners typically retain these late examples, driving consistent demand for high-quality remanufactured units
years.cta: Secure quotes for 2017-2018 Citroen DS5 replacement engines

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Citroen DS5 was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Citroen DS5 specialists.

faq.h2: Citroen DS5 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Citroen DS5 engine?
items.answer: Citroen DS5 engine replacement costs typically range from £1,800 to £3,200 for a rebuilt unit supply-only, depending on engine code and variant. Used engines start around £300-£800 but carry higher risk. Supply & fit adds £400-£800 labour. All rebuilt engines through our network include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Citroen DS5 specialists.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 1.6 HDi engines average £1,800-£2,400 supply-only across UK specialists
THP petrol replacements cost £2,000-£2,900 due to timing component upgrades required
Used engines are cheaper but rarely include meaningful warranty coverage beyond 90 days
Supply & fit labour typically adds £400-£800 depending on garage location and complexity
items.cta: Compare live Citroen DS5 engine replacement quotes from UK specialists now

items.question: Which Citroen DS5 engine is most reliable - and which should I avoid?
items.answer: The 2.0 HDi DW10CB diesel is the Citroen DS5's most reliable engine, with robust construction and fewer catastrophic failure points. Avoid early 1.6 THP petrol engines (EP6CDTM) due to notorious timing chain tensioner weaknesses that often cause total engine failure before 80,000 miles without preventative maintenance.
keyPoints: 2.0 HDi 160 engines routinely exceed 150,000 miles with proper servicing and oil changes
1.6 BlueHDi 120 units improved on early HDi reliability but still suffer EGR and DPF issues
THP 210 (5G04) benefits from revised tensioners but retains inherent Prince engine design vulnerabilities
Hybrid4 systems require specialist knowledge; standard garages cannot safely service the electric coupling
items.cta: Find a rebuilt Citroen DS5 2.0 HDi engine with upgraded reliability components

items.question: What causes Citroen DS5 THP timing chain failure?
items.answer: Citroen DS5 THP timing chain failure stems from the rear-mounted hydraulic tensioner losing pressure, allowing the chain to stretch and skip teeth. This disrupts cam/crank correlation, triggering P0016 fault codes and often causing piston-valve contact if the engine continues running under load.
keyPoints: EP6CDTM and EP6FDTM codes share the same vulnerable Prince engine tensioner design
Oil change intervals beyond 10,000 miles accelerate tensioner wear and chain stretch significantly
Cold-start rattling for 2-3 seconds is the earliest audible warning sign owners report
Once the chain skips, valve damage is almost certain and requires full engine replacement
items.cta: Get quotes for Citroen DS5 EP6CDTM rebuilt engines with upgraded tensioner kits

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Citroen DS5?
items.answer: Replacing a Citroen DS5 engine is worth it if the vehicle is in good cosmetic and structural condition, with service history and under £4,000 market value. A rebuilt engine costing £2,000-£3,000 extends life by 80,000+ miles, often proving cheaper than purchasing a replacement DS5 with unknown history.
keyPoints: DS5 values range £2,500-£6,000 depending on trim, mileage and service documentation
Rebuilt engines include upgraded components addressing original failure points like HPFP or tensioners
Supply & fit through our network typically completes within 3-5 working days nationwide
Warranty coverage on rebuilt units protects your investment far beyond used engine options
items.cta: Compare Citroen DS5 engine replacement costs against current used vehicle prices

items.question: How do I find my Citroen DS5 engine code?
items.answer: Your Citroen DS5 engine code appears on the VIN plate under the bonnet, in the service book, or on the engine block itself near the timing cover. Common codes include 9HD, 9HR for 1.6 HDi diesels and EP6CDTM, EP6FDTM for 1.6 THP petrols. Enter your registration above for instant code verification.
keyPoints: DV6 family diesels use codes 9HD, 9HR, 9HC, 9HL depending on power output and Euro standard
EP6 petrol codes EP6CDTM (156hp) and EP6FDTM (165hp) indicate different tensioner revisions
DW10CB and DW10CTED4 denote 2.0L diesel variants with different turbo and emissions hardware
Hybrid4 models combine DW10CTED4 diesel core with R2E electric motor requiring specialist matching
items.cta: Enter your Citroen DS5 registration to instantly identify your exact engine code

items.question: Should I buy a Citroen DS5 petrol or diesel engine?
items.answer: Choose diesel if you cover over 12,000 miles annually and primarily drive motorways; the 2.0 HDi offers strong torque and 50+ mpg. Opt for THP petrol only if you prefer sharper throttle response and accept higher replacement costs due to timing chain vulnerabilities on the EP6 family.
keyPoints: 1.6 HDi and 2.0 HDi diesels deliver superior fuel economy for high-mileage UK commuters
THP petrol engines provide engaging performance but carry higher long-term replacement risk
BlueHDi Euro 6 diesels require AdBlue top-ups and suffer DPF issues on short urban journeys
Hybrid4 combines diesel efficiency with electric torque but demands specialist servicing and parts
items.cta: Compare Citroen DS5 diesel and petrol engine replacement prices side-by-side

items.question: How long do Citroen DS5 engines typically last?
items.answer: With proper servicing, Citroen DS5 2.0 HDi diesel engines routinely reach 150,000-180,000 miles. 1.6 HDi units typically last 100,000-130,000 miles before HPFP or turbo issues arise. THP petrol engines often require major work between 60,000-90,000 miles due to timing chain tensioner weaknesses inherent to the Prince design.
keyPoints: Full service history with oil changes every 10,000 miles significantly extends all DS5 engine lifespans
Short-journey urban driving accelerates DPF clogging on diesel models, reducing effective engine life
THP engines with revised EP6FDTM tensioners show improved longevity over early EP6CDTM units
Hybrid4 systems add complexity; electric motor coupling wear often appears around 90,000 miles
items.cta: Find a rebuilt Citroen DS5 engine designed to exceed original factory lifespan

items.question: Can any garage replace a Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 engine?
items.answer: No, Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 engine replacement requires a specialist familiar with PSA's diesel-electric coupling, high-voltage safety protocols, and hybrid control module calibration. Standard garages lack the diagnostic tools and training to safely isolate the 37hp rear electric motor during engine removal and refit.
keyPoints: Hybrid4 systems combine DW10CTED4 diesel front engine with R2E rear electric motor and battery pack
High-voltage isolation procedures must be followed to prevent electrical shock during engine removal
Hybrid control module requires recalibration after engine replacement to restore torque distribution logic
Specialist rebuilders bench-test both diesel and electric components before supply to ensure integration
items.cta: Enquire about Citroen DS5 Hybrid4 specialist engine replacement from certified UK suppliers

items.question: Is a used Citroen DS5 engine better value than a rebuilt one?
items.answer: Used Citroen DS5 engines cost £300-£800 versus £1,800-£3,200 for rebuilt units, but rarely include meaningful warranty coverage. Rebuilt engines come with upgraded components addressing known failure points and a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, offering better long-term value for owners planning to keep their DS5.
keyPoints: Used engines carry unknown mileage and service history, increasing risk of premature repeat failure
Rebuilt units replace worn bearings, seals and gaskets with new or upgraded specification parts
Supply-only pricing excludes fitting labour; factor £400-£800 additional for professional installation
Warranty claims on used engines typically require return to original supplier, causing vehicle downtime
items.cta: Compare used versus rebuilt Citroen DS5 engine prices with warranty terms included

items.question: What does P0016 fault code mean on Citroen DS5 THP engines?
items.answer: P0016 on Citroen DS5 THP engines indicates crankshaft-camshaft correlation error, usually caused by timing chain stretch or VANOS solenoid failure on EP6CDTM/EP6FDTM codes. Ignoring this code risks the chain skipping teeth, causing piston-valve contact and catastrophic engine failure requiring full replacement.
keyPoints: P0016 commonly appears on THP engines between 50,000-80,000 miles as tensioner pressure declines
Replacing VANOS solenoids and resetting adaptation values can temporarily clear the code
If chain stretch is confirmed via diagnostic scanner, only full timing component replacement prevents failure
Once valve damage occurs, engine replacement is the only viable repair option for most owners
items.cta: Get urgent quotes for Citroen DS5 EP6CDTM engine replacement before P0016 causes total failure
